response: The annual disaster recovery (DR) test completed by the Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) team resulted in an actual recovery time objective (RTO) of 6 hours 23 minutes that missed the 4-hour target, with the gap stemming from a database restore taking 3 hours (instead of the planned 1 hour) due to a larger-than-expected dataset. The SRE recommends two corrective actions—increasing backup frequency and pre-provisioning a standby database—and confirms the next DR test is scheduled for October.
